verdict.reason: Two issues: (1) .expect() on HumanQuestion::try_new() in pure non-test core code (steps.rs:201-211) — must add a from_static() constructor that enforces non-emptiness at compile time or restructure so the infallibility is structurally guaranteed. (2) AdrPhase::Rejected is unreachable dead state — no event or handler ever transitions to it; either remove it until the 'human permanently rejects' story is implemented, or implement that path now with a test.
